name: Honeywell International
analysis: HON has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $231.1900, stop $203.4648, target $314.3656 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
